title: Delicate Japanese Bao
description: Soft, fluffy bao dough infused with delicate yeast flavor, perfect for serving with your favorite Japanese dishes.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine 1 cup of warm water and 1 teaspoon of delicate yeast.
2. Let the mixture sit for 5-10 minutes, until it becomes frothy.
3. Add the bao flour, salt, sugar, and Japanese milk to the bowl.
4. Mix the dough until it forms a smooth ball.
5. Knead the dough for 10 minutes, until it becomes elastic.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl and let it rise for 1 hour, until it doubles in size.
7. Once the dough has risen, punch it down and divide it into 4-6 equal pieces.
8. Shape each piece into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk.
9. Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
10. Cook the bao for 2-3 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown.
11. Brush the bao with vegetable oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds, if desired.
12. Serve the bao warm with your favorite Japanese dishes.
